name: bourre-functions
description: Server-authoritative Bourré deal, draw, play, and settlement

scripts.lint: node --check index.js && node --check gameHandlers.js && node --check orphanRoomCleanup.js
scripts.test: node --test gameHandlers.test.mjs publicTable.test.mjs publicTableReplacement.test.mjs publicTableIdle.test.mjs publicTableIdle.touch.test.mjs publicTableIdle.midhand.test.mjs publicTableIdle.joinSpectator.test.mjs publicTableIdle.gamestart.test.mjs orphanRoomCleanup.test.mjs
